inputs.label: Base Price per Unit
inputs.businessContext: The standard price per unit before any bulk discount is applied.

businessContext_i18n.en: The standard price per unit before any bulk discount is applied.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplu indirim uygulanmadan önceki standart birim fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Standardpreis pro Einheit vor Anwendung eines Mengenrabatts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le prix standard par unité avant application de toute remise sur volume.
businessContext_i18n.es: El precio estándar por unidad antes de aplicar cualquier descuento por volumen.
businessContext_i18n.ar: السعر القياسي لكل وحدة قبل تطبيق أي خصم كميات.

inputs.label: Quantity Ordered
inputs.businessContext: The total number of units being purchased in a single order.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total number of units being purchased in a single order.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir siparişte satın alınan toplam birim sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Gesamtzahl der in einer Bestellung gekauften Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre total d'unités achetées en une seule commande.
businessContext_i18n.es: El número total de unidades compradas en un solo pedido.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد الوحدات المشتراة في طلب واحد.

inputs.label: Maximum Discount
inputs.businessContext: The upper limit of the discount percentage achievable with very large orders.

businessContext_i18n.en: The upper limit of the discount percentage achievable with very large orders.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çok büyük siparişlerde ulaşılabilen maksimum indirim yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Obergrenze des Rabattprozentsatzes, der bei sehr großen Bestellungen erreichbar ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La limite supérieure du pourcentage de remise atteignable avec des commandes très importantes.
businessContext_i18n.es: El límite superior del porcentaje de descuento alcanzable con pedidos muy grandes.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحد الأعلى لنسبة الخصم التي يمكن تحقيقها مع الطلبات الكبيرة جدًا.

inputs.label: Discount Scale Factor
inputs.businessContext: The quantity at which the discount reaches approximately 63% of the maximum discount (i.e., the e-folding scale).

businessContext_i18n.en: The quantity at which the discount reaches approximately 63% of the maximum discount (i.e., the e-folding scale).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İndirimin maksimum indirimin yaklaşık %63'üne ulaştığı miktar (e-katlama ölçeği).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Menge, bei der der Rabatt etwa 63 % des maximalen Rabatts erreicht (d. h. die e-Faltungs-Skala).
businessContext_i18n.fr: La quantité à laquelle la remise atteint environ 63 % de la remise maximale (c'est-à-dire l'échelle de e-folding).
businessContext_i18n.es: La cantidad en la que el descuento alcanza aproximadamente el 63% del descuento máximo (es decir, la escala de e-fold).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الكمية التي يصل عندها الخصم إلى حوالي 63% من الحد الأقصى للخصم (أي مقياس e-folding).

hiddenLossDrivers: Composite model — validate each cost leg against actuals
Physical exposure factors are normalized estimates
Direct labor cost is set to 0 because no labor-related inputs are available in this tool
suggestedActions: Reconcile labor and maintenance legs separately
Benchmark noise/vibration factors with site measurement
